titleStmt.title: SII 11.75: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 75. (B.K. No. 87 of 1927-28). SIRŪR, MUNDARGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON THE STONE DOOR FRAME OF THE TŌRAṆAGALLA BRAHMADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription refers itself to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva I and mentions Jagadēkamalla Irmaḍi Noḷaṁba-Pallava-Permānaḍi as governing the five villages in Māsivāḍi One Hundred and Forty, and records the remission of certain taxes made by the six gāvuṇḍas (whose names are given) in respect of Kuṁchavaḍuga Dāsayya for having constructed the siri-vāgilu (gate of fortune, i.e., the main gate) at Sirivura. Dāsa is stated to be an ornament of the Sinda-kula and is called Paḍevaḷa Dāsa.

Irmaḍi Noḷamba figures in another inscription of Sirūr as administering the same territory in Śaka 963 (Ep. Ind. Vol. XV, pp. 335 ff). It may be presumed that this chief for whom dates Śaka 963 and Śaka 964 (date of the present record) are known is identical with Jagadēkamalla Noḷaṁba [alias] Irmaḍi Noḷaṁba who was the elder brother of Trailōkyamalla Nanni-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permānaḍi figuring in the Mōrigere record of Śaka 967 (No. 443 of 1914).
The inscription is dated Śaka 964, Chitrabhānu, Kārtika, śu. 2, Monday, which corresponds to A.D. 1042, October 18, Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma jjagadēkama
lladēvara rājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi prava
rddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttami
re . tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapaṁca
mahāsabda pallavānvaya śrīprithvīvalla
bhaṁ pallavakuḷatiḷakanēkavākyaṁ kāṁ
cīpuravarēśvaraṁ śrīmajjagadēkamallanirmma
ḍi noḷaṁbapallavapermmānaḍigaḷmā sivā
ḍi nūṟanālvattaṟa baḷiya paṁcagrāmaṁ sukha
saṁkathāvinōdadi nāḷuttamire . saka nṛpa
kāḷātītasaṁvatsarasataṅgaḷ 964 neya
citrabhānu saṁvatsarada kārttika suddha bidige
sōmavāradandu sirivurada sirivāgilaṁ kuṁca
vaḍuga dāsayyaṁ māḍisidudake Āycagā
vuṇḍaṁ candagāvuṇḍaṁ dāsagāvuṇḍaṁ cāva
gāvuṇḍaṁ sōvagāvuṇḍaṁ perggaḍe sōvayya
nintaṟuvarggāvuṇḍugaḷmiḻdu maṁneya sā
myadoḷ biṭṭa marnnaṇe yentendoḍe manneyadeṟe
Āḷivasatāya poge voge taḷāṟagū
li I . di taṁbulaṁ modalāgi Ātana makkaḷvaruḷvara sa
rvvabhādaparihāraṁ kādu naḍeyisuvar .
Ārovvaridarkke vakraṁ bandaḷidu naḍeyisame
ndaḍe sirivāgilaleniseḻtu nuguḻdu pōdavanitu
ma naḷida mahāpātakanakkuṁ . baredaṁ barmmayyaṁ
© Akkara . siṁdavaṁsakke tiḷakavāgiḻdāta ninduni
bhānane cāvuṇḍakabbe . sandajanani kēḷeṟegā
tiṅgaṁ pitruvendu dinnēvēḷvudoḷpugaḷaṁ . maṁdarā
driyiṁ dakṣiṇa bhāgadoḷ saṁdiḻdudarake
ṟe janmabhūmi . kaṁdamitranibhaṁ dāsanendaḍē
nendapai sujanajanāśrayanaṁ . © dharaṇīśaṁ
jayasiṅghadēvanarapaṁ kūḻtarkkaṟiṁ koṭṭoḍā
daradiṁ kuñcama nāṁtukoṇḍu piridondutsāhadiṁdaṁ
dharābharamaṁ taṁdana bhṛtyanaṁdamane laṁkēśaṁge
hridyōgamaṁ nirutaṁ māḍidanannanalte nagaḻdī dā
saṁ karaṁ sāsadoḷ © paḍedudanattadhōgatige
ggavaḷaṁtire poḻdubaytu kēḷkuḍaluṇalāṟa
rppa vapōḥ tolagalladoḍennapēḷdudaṁ ta
ḍeyade kaltu dharmmaparanāguga doṁduli
vaṁte sāṟuguṁ paḍevaḷadāsa ninnanuḍivā
gamamuṁ varadarmmadānamuṁ . baredaṁ kuḷakaraṇi ba
rmmayaṁ . ©
Digital edition of SII 11.75 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
